{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Update .env.example with CLIENT_PORTAL_URL","description":"Add `CLIENT_PORTAL_URL=https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com` to `.env.example` with a comment section.

Add under a new section after the "Base URL for link generation" section (around line 65-67):
```
# ============================================
# Client Portal (External Next.js App)
# ============================================
# External portal URL for client-facing proposal links
# The client portal is a separate Next.js app at portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com
CLIENT_PORTAL_URL=https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com
```","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-22T21:57:28.703Z"}

Task #2 complete. Upgraded proposal email templates in hooks/useProposalActions.ts. Changes made: 1. Added `escapeHtml(str)` helper at line 28 - escapes &, <, >, ", ' characters 2. Added `generateProposalEmailHtml(params)` function at line 37 - full branded bilingual HTML template matching the payment-link.js style exactly: same gradient header, same card layout, same colors, same footer with tax numbers and bottom links 3. `handleCreateQuote` (around line 655) - replaced bare `

` HTML with `generateProposalEmailHtml(...)` call 4. `handleSendProposal` (around line 986) - backward-compat: if `customMessage` exists use it (converted with `.replace(/\n/g, '
')`), otherwise use `generateProposalEmailHtml(...)` with data from the quote object and `quoteUrl` from share-url response Typecheck: the one TS error in the file at line 549 (`payloadData as QuoteData`) is pre-existing and not introduced by my changes. All other errors are in unrelated files.
summary: Task 2 complete - branded bilingual email templates added

text:
Task #1 complete. Fixed portal URL generation in all four files:

1. `api/quotes/[id]/share-url.js` - Replaced `getPortalBase(req)` with `getPortalBase()` that returns `(process.env.CLIENT_PORTAL_URL || 'https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com').replace(/\/+$/, '')`. Removed `ensureQuotePath`. Kept `normalizeBaseUrl`, `isUuid`, `tryCreateAccess`.

2. `api/quotes/[id]/portal-links.js` - Same change as share-url.js.

3. `api/lib/autoProposal.js` - Replaced `getPortalQuoteBase()` with the same env-var-based pattern. Removed unused `normalizeBaseUrl` since it was only defined, not called.

4. `api/quotes/index.js` - Changed URL generation from `resolveBaseUrl(req)` + `/quote/${id}` + access token to `${portalBase}/${quote.id}` using `CLIENT_PORTAL_URL`. Removed `access` from response (was only used for URL building). Removed now-unused `resolveBaseUrl` function and `createPortalAccessForQuote`/`buildPortalAccessQuery` import.
summary: Task 1 complete - portal URL generation fixed

text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Write regression tests for portal URL and email template changes","description":"Write two test files:

1. `tests/api/quotes-share-url-portal.test.ts` - Test portal URL generation:
   - share-url returns external portal URL when CLIENT_PORTAL_URL is set
   - URL format is `https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com/{id}` (no `/quote/` prefix)
   - Hash fragments work (#menu, #contract)
   - Fallback to default `https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com` when CLIENT_PORTAL_URL is not set
   - Uses same test patterns as existing `tests/api/quotes-share-url.test.ts`

2. `tests/hooks/useProposalActions-email.test.ts` - Test email template:
   - `handleCreateQuote` with `sendToClient=true` sends branded email (not bare text)
   - `handleSendProposal` sends branded email with portal link
   - Email contains both EN and FR text (bilingual)
   - Email contains event details (date, headcount, event type)
   - Email contains CTA button with portal URL
   - Uses same test patterns as existing `tests/hooks/useProposalActions.test.ts`

Mock patterns: vi.mock for authMiddleware, portalAccess, supabaseClient, apiFetch, emailService.
Follow existing test file naming conventions and vitest patterns.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-22T22:02:52.563Z"}
